message:
feat(tables): Migrate tables.rs to rich_rust

Add dual implementation for ScanResultsTable, StatsTable, and PackListTable:

- When rich-output feature is enabled, tables render using rich_rust
  for premium terminal output with styled cells and box styles
- Markdown style output still uses comfy-table for compatibility
- Feature-gated implementation preserves API compatibility

Changes:
- Add #[cfg(feature = "rich-output")] render_rich() methods
- Add severity_markup_rich(), noise_markup_rich(), status_markup_rich()
- Add TableStyle::to_box_style() for rich_rust box style mapping
- Add TableStyle::is_markdown() to route Markdown to comfy-table
- Keep comfy-table implementation as render_comfy() for fallback

Part of bd-2pre: Phase 3 Tables & Progress Migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
